title: U.F.O. Files Released by U.S. Shed Light on What the Government Knows
summary_full: The Pentagon on Friday released online what it called “new, never-before-seen” files, dating back decades, related to unidentified flying objects.
summary_public: The Pentagon on Friday released online what it called “new, never-before-seen” files, dating back decades, related to unidentified flying objects.
